arcs.title: The Crumb Commendation
arcs.summary: New arc opening quietly: Mr. Percival Crumb of Vault 339 has submitted a written commendation that has been filed at Gringotts — itself unprecedented. The duty goblin has read it twice. There is some internal question about whether the commendation creates an obligation, sets a precedent, or simply means what it says. Day 2 should cover the goblin response — whether they file it further, frame it, dispute it, or use it as a bargaining chip in some entirely unrelated matter.
